prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Mercedes-AMG EQ Performance** dual-motor setup (EQG-specific M2978 electric drive units) with **AVL Racetech** torque vectoring software, increasing combined output to **850 kW (1,140 hp)** and **1,600 Nm of torque**, paired with a **McLaren Applied 800V silicon carbide inverter** for 30% faster response times

Installation of a **Mahle Motorsport** liquid-cooled 108 kWh battery pack with **Porsche Taycan Turbo S-derived** 93.4 kWh usable capacity, featuring **Sila Nanotechnologies** silicon-anode cells for 20% higher energy density and **Webasto** 350 kW ultra-fast charging capability

Replacement of the stock **Mercedes-Benz G-Class portal axles** with **KW Suspensions** 3-way adjustable **EQG-specific** coilovers (height-adjustable by 50mm) and **AP Racing** 4-piston monoblock calipers with **Brembo** 420mm carbon-ceramic rotors, paired with **HRE** FF17 flow-formed wheels (22x12 front, 22x13 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (305/35 R22 front, 325/30 R22 rear)
estetica: **RML Group** EQG-specific widebody conversion kit with **carbon-fiber** fender flares (50mm wider front, 70mm wider rear), **aluminum** rocker panels, and **polycarbonate** rear quarter windows for a 15% weight reduction

**Vorsteiner** carbon-fiber front splitter with **active aerodynamics** (adjustable angle via **Bosch** ECU integration) and **rear diffuser** with **Gorilla Automotive** titanium exhaust outlets (dual 100mm tips) for the **EQG 560 4MATIC**’s **N120** electric platform

**Rotiform** LAS-R forged wheels in **matt bronze** (custom offsets: +25mm front, +15mm rear) with **HRE** center-lock adapters, paired with **LuxuryTuning** LED headlight upgrades (Cree XHP70.2 chips, 12,000-lumen output) and **Vland** sequential taillights with **Mercedes-AMG GT Black Series** animation patterns
